title: Myst Modded
description: Myst Modded is a diverse and feature-rich Minecraft modpack focused on exploration, survival, building, and performance — offering something for every playstyle.
body:
A feature-rich and diverse modpack for Minecraft 1.21.1 (NeoForge) that reimagines survival, exploration, and creativity without losing the soul of vanilla. Built for players who want **variety**, **depth**, and **performance** in a single cohesive experience.
